comments.body: Cockpit tests failed for commit bbce2115a17b79f951f6a0a65d392c81aef90e34. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.

@martinpitt thanks for reporting! It is weird, checking the logs:

```

2023-10-06T04:04:01.628+0000 | Testing farm 2f40670b-629a-4937-bab3-273b16d75434 result:unknown
...

2023-10-06T04:04:01.637+0000 | Status reporter will report for GithubProject(namespace="containers", repo="podman"), commit=bbce2115a17b79f951f6a0a65d392c81aef90e34, pr=20286
2023-10-06T04:04:01.637+0000 | Setting Github status check 'failure' for check 'testing-farm:fedora-39-x86_64:cockpit-revdeps': Tests failed ...

```

and then 2 minutes later:

```

2023-10-06T04:06:48.829+0000 | Testing farm 2f40670b-629a-4937-bab3-273b16d75434 result:passed
...

2023-10-06T04:06:48.837+0000 | Status reporter will report for GithubProject(namespace="containers", repo="podman"), commit=bbce2115a17b79f951f6a0a65d392c81aef90e34, pr=20286
2023-10-06T04:06:48.838+0000 | Setting Github status check 'success' for check 'testing-farm:fedora-39-x86_64:cockpit-revdeps': Tests passed ...

```

therefore you see only the successful state since the failed one was overwritten

I will try to find out why we assigned `unknown` in the beginning (this is the default value when we cannot parse the result from TF payload) and let you know

@lbarcziova Thanks! I just reported https://github.com/packit/packit-service/issues/2216 with an issue that initially looked different, but may well be the same root cause. Perhaps let's continue to discuss there?
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
